ejaculate.t:
vt. 突然说出, 射出
vi. 射出, 射精
n. 精液

ejaculated.t: v. 突然说出( ejaculate的过去式和过去分词 ); 射出（液体）

ejaculates.t:
n. 射出( ejaculate的名词复数 ); 突然的喊出; 射出者; 射出器
v. 突然说出( ejaculate的第三人称单数 ); 射出（液体）
ejaculates.d:
n the thick white fluid containing spermatozoa that is ejaculated by the male genital tract
v utter impulsively
v eject semen

ejaculating.t: v. 突然说出( ejaculate的现在分词 ); 射出（液体）
ejaculating.d: p. pr. & vb. n. of Ejaculate

ejaculatio deficiens.t: [医] 不全射精, 射精障碍

ejaculation.t:
n. 突然说出, 射出, 射精
[医] 射精
ejaculation.d:
n. an abrupt emphatic exclamation expressing emotion
n. the discharge of semen in males

ejaculations.t:
(ejaculation 的复数) n. 突然说出, 射出, 射精
[医] 射精
ejaculations.d:
plural of ejaculation
n. an abrupt emphatic exclamation expressing emotion
n. the discharge of semen in males

ejaculator.t:
n. 突然叫喊的人, 射出者
[医] 射出者
ejaculator.d:
n. a man who ejaculates semen
n. a speaker who utters a sudden exclamation

ejaculator seminis.t: [医] 球海绵体肌, 尿道括约肌

ejaculatory.t:
a. 突然喊叫的, 感叹的, 射出用的
[医] 射精的
ejaculatory.d:
a. Casting or throwing out; fitted to eject; as,
   ejaculatory vessels.
a. Suddenly darted out; uttered in short sentences; as,
   an ejaculatory prayer or petition.
a. Sudden; hasty.

ejb.t: abbr. JAVA中的商业应用组件技术（Enterprise Java Bean）

eject.t:
vt. 逐放, 放逐, 喷射
[化] 排出
eject.d:
v. put out or expel from a place
v. leave an aircraft rapidly, using an ejection seat or capsule

eject disk.t: [计] 抽出磁盘, 弹出磁盘

ejecta.t:
n. 喷出物, 渣, 废物
[医] 排出物

ejectable.t: a. 驱逐的, 排泄的

ejected.t: a. 射出的；被放出的；被驱逐的
ejected.d:
v put out or expel from a place
v eliminate (a substance)
v leave an aircraft rapidly, using an ejection seat or capsule
v cause to come out in a squirt

ejecting.d:
v put out or expel from a place
v eliminate (a substance)
v leave an aircraft rapidly, using an ejection seat or capsule
v cause to come out in a squirt

ejection.t:
n. 驱逐, 喷出, 排出物
[化] 排出
ejection.d: n. the act of forcing out someone or something

ejection period.t: [医] 射血期(心室), 脉搏期

ejection phase.t: [医] 排出期, 心室射血期

ejections.t:
(ejection 的复数) n. 驱逐, 喷出, 排出物
[化] 排出
ejections.d:
plural of ejection
n. the act of forcing out someone or something

ejective.t: a. 放出的, 喷出的, 驱逐的

ejectment.t: n. 放逐, (租用权等的)剥夺
ejectment.d:
n. A casting out; a dispossession; an expulsion; ejection;
   as, the ejectment of tenants from their homes.
n. A species of mixed action, which lies for the recovery
   of possession of real property, and damages and costs for the wrongful
   withholding of it.

ejectments.t: (ejectment 的复数) n. 放逐, (租用权等的)剥夺
ejectments.d:
plural of ejectment
n. A casting out; a dispossession; an expulsion; ejection;
   as, the ejectment of tenants from their homes.
n. A species of mixed action, which lies for the recovery
   of possession of real property, and damages and costs for the wrongful
   withholding of it.

ejector.t:
n. 驱逐者, 排出器, 放出器
[化] 喷射泵; 喷射器
ejector.d:
n a person who ousts or supplants someone else
n a mechanism in a firearm that ejects the empty shell case after firing

ejector mixing.t: [化] 喷射混合器; 喷射式混合器; 喷射搅拌器; 喷射式搅拌器

ejectors.t:
(ejector 的复数) n. 驱逐者, 排出器, 放出器
[化] 喷射泵; 喷射器
ejectors.d:
plural of ejector
n a person who ousts or supplants someone else
n a mechanism in a firearm that ejects the empty shell case after firing

ejects.t: v. 弹出, 喷出, 排出( eject的第三人称单数 ); 逐出; （飞机坠毁前从弹射座椅）弹出
ejects.d:
v put out or expel from a place
v eliminate (a substance)
v leave an aircraft rapidly, using an ejection seat or capsule
v cause to come out in a squirt

ejf.t: abbr. estimated junction frequency 估计结频率

ejidatario.t: n. [西班牙语] (墨西哥)合作农场的农民(或工人)；(墨西哥)村社的村民

ejidatarios.t: (ejidatario 的复数) n. [西班牙语] (墨西哥)合作农场的农民(或工人)；(墨西哥)村社的村民

ejidos.t: (ejido 的复数) n.(墨西哥的)合作农场

ejusdem generis.t: [法] 同类的, 同样性质的

ejv.t: abbr. external jugular vein 颈外静脉
